step1Detail: Drop a job URL or paste the description. Takes 30 seconds. No account needed, no forms to fill.
step2Detail: AI rewrites corporate fluff into plain language. The actual day-to-day, team context, and what matters if you are considering the role.
step3Detail: Every listing is personally reviewed before going live. If it's vague, misleading, or just a recruiter blast, it gets rejected.
step4Detail: Apply directly or request a warm intro. Your info goes straight to the person who posted. No recruiters, no ghosting.
